constraints.coverage_assumption: Assume the user means the GPT-5 model released by OpenAI, which is not represented in the supplied corpus of 5 papers (Attention Is All You Need, Adam, BERT, GPT-2, GPT-3).

normalized_question: Identify whether the user is asking about the GPT-5 model and, if so, what specific action they want performed, since GPT-5 is not in the available corpus.
raw_question: What are the architecture details of GPT-5?
